gals who rent

Finding flatmates, navigating landlords and surviving house-hunting is a lot easier with the right gals beside you. Share listings, swap advice and celebrate every flat-warming along the way.

why gals who rent?

house-hunting is better with your people

whether you're flat-hunting for the first time, looking for a trustworthy flatmate, or just want a second opinion before signing a lease, gals who rent is a supportive space to figure it all out together.

share listings, swap contract red flags, get moving day advice and celebrate the flat-warmings, because finding a home should feel exciting, not stressful.
